stock_market.summary: U.S. markets closed on a mixed but optimistic note regarding Middle East de-escalation; tech leaders hold steady, art market continues its blue-chip trajectory into Q2 2026.

key_metrics.impact: Market remains sensitive to geopolitical developments, specifically Middle East stability

art_market.summary: The art market shows sustained strength in the blue-chip segment, with early Q2 outlooks remaining positive despite broader economic uncertainty.

key_metrics.major_events: Continuing strong auction results for modern works.
